fields.title: Clean Code
fields.author: Robert C. Martin
fields.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Even bad code can function, but if code isn't clean, it can bring a development organization to its knees.

fields.title: The Great Gatsby
fields.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
fields.description: A classic novel set in the Jazz Age, exploring themes of wealth, love, and the American Dream.

fields.title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
fields.author: Yuval Noah Harari
fields.description: A groundbreaking narrative of humanity's creation and evolution, exploring how Homo sapiens came to dominate the Earth.

fields.title: Introduction to Algorithms
fields.author: Thomas H. Cormen
fields.description: The quintessential algorithms textbook, covering a broad range of algorithms in depth.

fields.title: Atomic Habits
fields.author: James Clear
fields.description: An easy and proven way to build good habits and break bad ones.
